# Android SDK / Gradle Dependencies (companion_app build.gradle)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Min SDK: API 26 (Android 8.0 Oreo) — covers ~99% of active devices
# Target SDK: API 35 (Android 15)
# Language: Kotlin

# Core AndroidX
androidx.appcompat:appcompat                    # Backward-compatible app components
androidx.core:core-ktx                          # Kotlin extensions for Android core APIs
androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-service            # Lifecycle-aware background service support
androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-ktx

# UI (minimal — this is a background service app, not a full UI app)
com.google.android.material:material            # Material Design components for setup wizard
androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout      # Setup/status screen layout

# Networking / IPC (USB TCP server)
com.nanohttpd:nanohttpd                         # Lightweight embedded HTTP server for USB TCP bridge
# Alternative: fi.iki.elonen:nanohttpd

# Root Access
com.github.topjohnwu.libsu:core                 # libsu — Magisk/su shell access library
com.github.topjohnwu.libsu:service              # libsu service extension
com.github.topjohnwu.libsu:io                   # libsu file I/O with root

# Health Connect
androidx.health.connect:connect-client          # HealthConnect API (Android 13+)

# Coroutines (async operations)
org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android
org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-core

# JSON serialization (for PC protocol messages)
com.google.code.gson:gson                       # JSON serialize/deserialize for command protocol
# Alternative: org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-serialization-json

# Content Provider helpers
androidx.loader:loader                          # CursorLoader for async content provider queries

# Permissions
androidx.activity:activity-ktx                  # registerForActivityResult permission launcher

# Testing
junit:junit                                     # Unit tests
androidx.test.ext:junit                         # Android instrumented tests
androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core            # UI tests
